title: Pickaxe of the Gods (Plugin)
description: An unbreakable pickaxe with 20 levels (POG), which improves level by level !
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Welcome !

Adds a pickaxe that gains XP for every block it destroys to level up and become stronger. Add abilities like Big Hole, Silk Touch, Furnace, and others to make the pickaxe even stronger.

Features :
- 20 levels (editable)
- Adding capacity (editable)
- Added crafting for POG and each tool (editable)
- Adding permission

Commands :
- /pog give
To give yourself a Pickaxe of the Gods
- /pog xp {number}
Add a set amount of XP to POG (only if in hand)
- /pog reload
To reload the config

The resource pack is automatically installed by the plugin. Install in the plugin folder, configure if necessary, and play.

</details>
